title: Past application of Chapter
doc_html:
§855.  Past application of Chapter

This Chapter shall not apply with respect to any accident, or judgment arising therefrom, or violation of the motor vehicle laws of this state, occurring prior to the effective date of this Chapter.

Acts 1952, No. 52, §37.
doc_text:
§855.  Past application of Chapter
This Chapter shall not apply with respect to any accident, or judgment arising therefrom, or violation of the motor vehicle laws of this state, occurring prior to the effective date of this Chapter.
Acts 1952, No. 52, §37.
